entries.quote: We are deploying agentic AI both within the org and for over half a billion travel consumers by leveraging OpenAI's Enterprise platforms to reinvent the travel stack.
entries.signal: Bajpai is framing AI not as a feature but as an architectural rebuild — "reinventing the travel stack" implies infrastructure-level changes, not UI polish.
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] Management believes agentic AI will restructure how travel is discovered, planned, and booked at mass scale — and that being an early infrastructure-layer adopter creates a durable moat.

entries.quote: Ixigo NEXT is more than a chatbot added to an existing app — travel software itself is changing.
entries.signal: Kumar is staking Ixigo's next growth phase on a ground-up AI redesign, not incremental feature work
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] Management believes conversational, preference-aware interfaces will structurally replace filter-and-menu travel booking in India
